_readme.what: This file is the app list for Watch Floor. Edit it to add, reorder, or remove apps. index.html never needs to change.
add_an_app: 1. Copy any one block from the 'stations' list below.
2. Edit name, tag, url, accent (hex color), and icon.
3. Save, upload stations.json to the watch_floor repo, hard-refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R).
Order here = order on the floor (top-left first). Leave url as "" to show an app as 'pending' instead of a live link.
_readme.note: An unknown icon falls back to the 'grid' glyph, so a new app always shows even before it gets a custom mark.

stations.name: Launch Watch
stations.tag: Live rocket launch tracker — countdowns, weather, recent history.

stations.name: Commanders Watch
stations.tag: Game countdown, roster, division standings, Film Room.

stations.name: Chiefs Watch
stations.tag: Game countdown, roster, division standings, Film Room.

stations.name: Cardinals Watch
stations.tag: Schedule, standings with games-back, FanGraphs Film Room.

stations.name: DC Sentinel
stations.tag: Autonomous OSINT early-warning console for Washington DC.

stations.name: VetTix Digest
stations.tag: Daily event digest with deep links, calendar and spreadsheet.

stations.name: Detour
stations.tag: Worth-the-stop gas calculator — is the cheap fuel worth the off-route miles?

stations.name: World Cup Watch
stations.tag: FIFA World Cup 2026 — flip between Team USA focus and the full tournament.

stations.name: St. Louis City Watch
stations.tag: St. Louis City SC — MLS fixtures, Western Conference table, squad and form.

stations.name: Gibbs Watch
stations.tag: Joe Gibbs Racing — NASCAR Cup lineup, points and the 2026 schedule with live race countdown.
